decisions.briefing: Markets were flat today — NASDAQ and S&P 500 both unchanged — a quiet session with no major catalysts to force direction. With only $89 in cash and 4 open slots sitting idle, the priority was freeing capital: selling LITE and QQQ (neither appears in today's screener) to fund four score-95 momentum names — AAOI, AMD, FSS, and ESI — all showing clean bullish setups without overbought risk.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets closed essentially flat on April 29, 2026, with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ both posting negligible moves as investors paused ahead of fresh economic data. Trading was orderly with no major macro surprises, keeping broader indices in a holding pattern. In the absence of clear directional catalysts, stock-specific momentum and sector rotation dominated order flow throughout the session.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於2026年4月29日幾乎平收，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均錄得微幅變動，投資者在等待新一批經濟數據公布前普遍觀望。整體交投有序，未見重大宏觀意外，大盤指數維持整固格局。在缺乏明確方向性催化劑的情況下，個股動能及板塊輪動成為當日資金流向的主要驅動力。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Portfolio rotation means selling positions with weakening or uncertain momentum and redeploying that capital into stronger, higher-conviction setups. Rather than letting cash sit idle or holding names that no longer rank highly, a disciplined trader shifts exposure toward assets showing the best signals right now. Today's move — exiting LITE and QQQ to fund four score-95 momentum stocks — is a textbook rotation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 投資組合輪動是指賣出動能減弱或方向不明的持倉，並將資金重新部署至更具說服力、高確信度標的的策略。有紀律的投資者不會讓現金閒置，也不會繼續持有排名下滑的部位，而是將曝險轉移至當下訊號最強的資產。今日賣出LITE與QQQ、買入四檔評分95的動能股，正是典型的投資組合輪動操作。
